prompt: Update @note.txt so it says "After mutation." instead of "Before mutation.".

expected.text: Update @note.txt so it says "After mutation." instead of "Before mutation.".

tool.name: apply_patch
tool.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: note.txt
@@
-Before mutation.
+After mutation.
*** End Patch

expected.content: Updated note.txt to say After mutation.
